nasb.text: But whatever city you enter and they do not receive you, go out into its streets and say,

esv.text: But whenever you enter a town and they do not receive you, go into its streets and say,

cnv.text: 無論進哪一城，人若不接待你們，你們就出來到街上，說：

ccb.text: 但如果哪一个城镇的人不欢迎你们，你们就到街上宣告，

csbs.text: 无论进哪一个城，如果人们不接受你们，你们就到大街上去，说
